description_long: This object is a modern smartphone with a large, edge-to-edge display dominating the front surface, featuring a centered punch-hole camera at the top. The back is a matte or semi-matte finish with a rectangular camera module in the upper left corner, housing three camera lenses and a flash. The sides are slim and appear to be made of metal or high-quality plastic, with visible buttons on the right edge. The overall design is sleek and minimalistic, with rounded corners and a flat profile. The phone's color scheme is primarily dark gray or black, with a subtle gradient on the front display wallpaper. No external case or cover is present, and branding is not visible on any side.
description: A sleek, modern smartphone with a large edge-to-edge display, triple rear cameras, and a minimalist dark finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing a large, nearly bezel-less display with a centered punch-hole camera and a colorful abstract wallpaper.
description_view_1: Right side view revealing the slim profile and the presence of physical buttons along the edge.
description_view_2: Back view displaying a matte finish, a rectangular triple camera module with flash in the top left, and no visible branding.
description_view_3: Left side view showing the thin edge with no visible buttons or features.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen displays a colorful abstract wallpaper with blue, green, and purple brushstroke patterns. No icons, widgets, or notifications are visible.
attribute_camera_placement: Triple camera array and flash located in a rectangular module at the top left corner on the back.
attribute_button_layout: Physical buttons are present on the right edge, likely including a power button and volume rocker.
